title: uinst2uf
text: uinst2uf Copy an instance handle to a parameter or entity field of type handle . Explain this code long uinst2uf (UHACThOpr, intseqNr, UHACThInst); Copy Parameters hOpr Handle to the operation or entity parameter. seqNr Sequence number of the basic parameter or entity field (sequence numbers start with 1). hInst Instance handle. Return Values See the "Call-In API Return Codes" topic. Use Library: ucall Description uinst2uf copies an instance handle from your program to a basic parameter or entity field of type handle . This function can be used to pass instance handles from 3GL to 4GL. Example: uinst2uf The following example describes how to pass a 3GL-generated instance handle to 4GL so it can be used in ProcScript. First we create an instance of the service SERV2. Then we activate the operation PUTHANDLE in service TESTSVC, passing it the instance handle of SERV2 as an IN parameter. The service PUTHANDLE will then activate the operation HELLO in service SERV2, using the instance handle. The operation PUTHANDLE in service TESTSVC is defined as follows: Explain this code operation puthandle params handle hInst : in endparams activate hInst->Hello() if ( $status < 0 ) putmess "puthandle: status = %%$status" putmess "%%$procerrorcontext" endif end Copy The operation HELLO in service SERV2 is defined as follows: Explain this code operation hello putmess "Hello from SERV2.hello() !!!" end Copy This is the 3GL code: Explain this code #include <h3gl.h> test_handle2 () { UHACT hEnv; /* Environment handle */ UHACT hIn1, hIn2; /* Instance handles */ UHACT hOp1; /* Operation handle */ long actStatus, procErr; /* Activation status and procerr */ /* Get environment handle */ ueopen(&hEnv); /* Instantiate service SERV2 */ uinstnew (hEnv, (UCHAR *)"SERV2", 0, 0, UDEFAULT_COMM_MODE, 0, &hIn2, &procErr); /* Instantiate service TESTSVC */ uinstnew (hEnv, (UCHAR *)"TESTSVC", 0, 0, UDEFAULT_COMM_MODE, 0, &hIn1, &procErr); /* Instantiate operation RUNSERV2 */ uinstopr(hIn1,(UCHAR *)"PUTHANDLE", 0, &hOp1); uinst2uf(hOp1, 1, hIn2); uopract (hOp1, &actStatus, &procErr); /* Activate operation RUNSERV2 */ uinstdel (hIn1, 0); /* Destroy instance */ ufreeh (&hOp1); /* Free RUNSERV2 operation handle */ ufreeh (&hIn1); /* Free instance handle */ ufreeh (&hIn2); /* Free instance handle */ ufreeh (&hEnv); /* Free environment handle */ } Copy Related Links Call-In API Return Codes Codes that can possibly be returned by functions from the 3GL call-in API are consistent with the values returned by the ProcScript function $procerror, unless noted otherwise. uuf2inst Copy a basic parameter or entity field of type handle to a program variable.
